description: The ColorWheelTriangleMesh component is used in the old platform's color pickers. Some may call this a "flower" or a "color picker" visual.

fields.OuterRadius: The radius of the outer edge of the outer ring of the color circle of hues.
fields.InnerRadius: The radius of the inner edge of the outer ring of the color circle of hues.
fields.RingSegments: How many ring wise subdivisions of the outer ring of color hues.
fields.CursorPosition: The position of the cursor inside of the triangle.
fields.CursorSegments: How many ring wise subdivisions of the color picker cursor ring.
fields.CursorColor: The color of the cursor for color picking.
fields.CursorOuterRadius: The radius of the outer edge of the cursor ring.
fields.CursorInnerRadius: The radius of the inner edge of the cursor ring.
fields.CursorZOffset: How much to offset the color picker cursor off the surface of the triangle.

usage: Attach to a slot and insert into a MeshRenderer that supports vertex colors to view what it looks like.
